summary: Ledger Integrity verification complete. All 20 tests passed. Party dropdown correctly returns data from master sources ONLY (projects for customers, finance_vendors for vendors, users for employees). General Ledger filtering by party_type and party_id works correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/finance/general-ledger/accounts returns 200
party_filters has correct structure (customers, vendors, employees, projects)
Customers from master data (projects): 26 customers returned
Vendors from master data (finance_vendors): 9 vendors returned
Employees from master data (users): 49 employees returned
Filter by party_type=customer returns 200
Filter by party_type=vendor returns 200
Filter by party_type=employee returns 200
Filter by specific customer party_id returns 200
Filter by specific vendor party_id returns 200
Filter by specific employee party_id returns 200
Customer IDs are project_ids (stable identifiers) - e.g., proj_bc17d1df
Vendor IDs are vendor_ids from finance_vendors - e.g., vnd_0da18e9b
Employee IDs are user_ids from users - e.g., user_0f9c19d7effc
No duplicate customers in list
No duplicate vendors in list
No duplicate employees in list
Customer count within expected range (26 actual, expected ~26)
Vendor count within expected range (9 actual, expected ~9)
Employee count within expected range (49 actual, expected ~49)
critical_code_review_comments: Party dropdown correctly queries ONLY master data sources - no derivation from accounting_transactions
Customer IDs use project_id as stable identifier (data model limitation noted in code comments)
Vendor IDs use vendor_id from finance_vendors collection
Employee IDs use user_id from users collection
Receipt creation correctly populates party_id, party_type, party_name for ledger traceability
General Ledger filtering uses ID-based filtering (party_id), not name-based
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ledger integrity verified. Party dropdown returns: 26 customers (from projects), 9 vendors (from finance_vendors), 49 employees (from users with employee roles), 28 projects. All IDs are stable identifiers from master data sources. General Ledger filtering by party_type and party_id works correctly.
